title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: A tutorial on AWS Identity and Access Management covering users, roles, policies, least privilege principles, and security best practices. The content explains IAM fundamentals through analogies and demonstrates the IAM Access Analyzer tool for permission validation.
